description_long: This bungalow is a two-story residential building with a simple, rectangular footprint and a gable roof. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with large, evenly spaced windows on both floors, providing ample natural light. A driveway leads to a detached garage on one side, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The front entrance is accessible via a paved walkway, and the landscaping includes a row of trees lining the property. The roof features a small dormer or skylight, adding architectural interest to the otherwise straightforward design. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and functional, suitable for a suburban neighborhood.
description: A two-story, light-colored bungalow with a gable roof, large windows, a detached garage, and landscaped with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, the driveway extending to the left, and a row of trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the driveway, the side facade with windows, and trees along the property edge.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the back and side of the bungalow, the garage, and dense tree coverage.
